text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm accompanying Nishino Flower as she takes
part in a group dance lesson.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Behold my exemplary Bakushin dance
steps!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Soft, like a gentle zephyr caressing one's cheek...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wow!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
They're both so talented... Every movement is
brimming with energy. I want to see more!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I wonder what it takes to dance like they do...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Expressing themselves?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see. They're able to dance so well because
they're staying true to themselves.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I can do that too... I'll try expressing
myself through dance.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: But... I have no idea where to even start.
choice_data_list: Well, why not ask for advice?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? You mean... ask the two of them?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod in approval. The first person Nishino Flower
should go to for help with expressing herself is...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: The thing that makes you you, Flower, is how you're always giving everything you've got in everything you do!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to diligence, focus, and putting in
Bakushin effort, you're as exceptional as I am!
You just have to put that to the beat!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yes! Like so!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wait... what?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Come, Flower! Join me in performing my
exemplary Bakushin dance steps!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: O-okay! I'll give it all I have!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Nicely done! Now, let's crank up the speed!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: What?! You want to go faster?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: LET'S BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower desperately tries to keep up with
Sakura Bakushin O's lightning-swift dancing. She
nearly trips over her own feet at first...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But as I watch her dance with all she has, I really
do feel like this might be the key to discovering
her own style!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I believe it would be fastest to show
you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Show me what?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Let's be off.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ah! W-wait for meee!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Those capture your essence most, I believe.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Actual flowers?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Look how the blossoms dance upon the wind...
How courageous and sweet, with an underlying
stalwartness...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: They are all qualities which you embody, no?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Hm, hm, hmm. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Z-Zephyr?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Now, Flower, feel the wind. Let it embrace you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Feel it... Like this?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You're doing well. Let your body move
naturally and as freely as it pleases. Surrender
yourself to the flow.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: O-okay! Natural... and free!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she matches Yamanin Zephyr's movements,
Nishino Flower gradually becomes more relaxed
and her dancing more fluid.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like the key to discovering her own style
might lie within the transformation of her
movements!
